title: Timeline of Delmara
description: A beginning chronology of Delmara, from the remembered age of Aurumveldor to the present Post-Deluge age.

eras.name: Aurumveldian Era
eras.summary: The age of Aurumveldor, before the Great Deluge remade the Land Above.

events.name: Keepers Established
events.summary: The Keepers of Volelia are founded in the elder age of Delmara.

eras.name: The Great Deluge
eras.summary: The dividing catastrophe between Aurumveldor and the Delmara known in the present age. The Ondris River becomes the Ondris Sea, and Dughfaldur is drowned beneath its waters.

eras.name: Post-Deluge
eras.summary: The current age of Delmara, the Land Above after the flood and remaking of the old world.

events.name: Axont Established
events.summary: Axont rises in the Post-Deluge age.

events.name: Klad Settled
events.summary: The Klad establish their settlement north of Lake Imryll.
